Capture.title: Webcam Capture
Capture.description: Record of a webcam image capture at a specific time.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the captured image.

timestamp.description: The time the image was captured.

passId.description: The unique identifier for the mountain pass.

passName.description: The display name of the mountain pass.

/captures/{captureId}.description: Collection of minutely webcam image captures.
